title: ITR-1 Eligible — Salary, One House Property, Other Sources, Income ≤ ₹50L
description: A Resident individual is eligible for ITR-1 if their total income does not exceed ₹50 lakh and arises only from: (a) Salary/Pension, (b) One house property (not brought forward loss), (c) Other Sources excluding winnings from lotteries and race horses.

logic.if: taxpayer.resident_status == 'ROR' AND taxpayer.income.total <= 5000000 AND taxpayer.income.has_business == false AND taxpayer.income.capital_gains == false AND taxpayer.income.foreign_income == false AND taxpayer.is_director == false AND taxpayer.holds_unlisted_shares == false AND taxpayer.has_foreign_assets == false AND taxpayer.income.house_property_count <= 1 AND taxpayer.income.lottery_income == false
logic.else: ITR-1 not eligible — evaluate ITR-2, ITR-3, or ITR-4

authority.section: Section 139(1) read with ITR-1 Instructions AY2025-26

notes: All conditions must be satisfied simultaneously. Any one disqualifier pushes to ITR-2 or higher.
